examples: The spectacular sunrise made us exclaim in surprise.
That's why you exclaim "Ouch" after staying away from the pain signals you encountered before.
Could we render this inimitable picture properly, then would everybody exclaim, "Beautiful, unparalleled Italy!"
During the interview, I would mention a line and he would exclaim: "My daughter actually said that!"
Can General Motors create a hybrid Hummer and exclaim that eight miles per gallon is "Double the gas mileage!"
